name: flight505-harness
description: Composable harness engineering for Claude Code — conductor orchestration, headless build/optimize/research/triage plugins, and a monitoring dashboard. Self-contained, no cross-marketplace dependencies.

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Workflow orchestrator — reads workflow.yaml, sequences phases, manages Agent Teams, handles resume. The central coordinator for all harness plugins.

plugins.name: harness-build
plugins.description: Headless parallel feature builder — Agent Teams implementation with TDD enforcement, two-stage review, and quality gates. No wizard, no interaction.

plugins.name: harness-optimize
plugins.description: Headless keep/revert optimization loop — any artifact + metric, local or remote via SSH. Absorbs autoresearch capabilities including hardware detection and RunPod support.

plugins.name: harness-research
plugins.description: Headless literature search and synthesis — arXiv, Semantic Scholar, HF Papers, Perplexity. Structured input/output, composable with other phases.

plugins.name: harness-triage
plugins.description: Issue diagnosis and auto-fix — reads issues/errors, searches codebase for root cause, generates fix with regression tests, verifies fix.
